wo-test-fix.title: Test Suite Restoration Fix
wo-test-fix.instruction_raw: Restore the 27 failing tests (TypeError, BorrowerProfileDTO, etc.) identified in pytest_failures.log using the patterns defined in MISSION_spec_test_restoration_fix.md. Ensure 100% pass rate before closing.

wo-mock-leak-repair.title: Resolve MagicMock Leaks in Planners
wo-mock-leak-repair.instruction_raw: Identify and fix MagicMock leaks where planners are not properly cleaned up after ticks. Ensure all mocks are disposed of to prevent memory growth.

wo-ssot-purity.title: [SSoT Wave 1] Integer Purity & ID Normalization
wo-ssot-purity.instruction_raw: Enforce strict integer arithmetic for all monetary values. Remove 'float()' calls in ledger.py and central_bank_system.py. Replace all 'str(id)' comparisons with direct 'int' comparisons in world_state.py and settlement_system.py.

wo-ssot-authority.title: [SSoT Wave 2] Behavioral Sinking (Settlement Authority)
wo-ssot-authority.instruction_raw: Refactor SettlementSystem to sink side-effects (IMonetaryLedger, MetricsService) into the atomic transfer block. Ensure all public methods return transactions for 'Bubble-Up' logging. Eliminate 'God Mode' minting bypasses.

wo-ssot-intent.title: [SSoT Wave 3] Intent Unification (Transaction Processor)
wo-ssot-intent.instruction_raw: Refactor TransactionProcessor handlers to use SettlementSystem.process_transfer() exclusively for all balance mutations. Remove logic duplication between handlers and systems.

wo-ssot-cleanup.title: [SSoT Wave 4] Orchestration Cleanup
wo-ssot-cleanup.instruction_raw: Delete redundant Phase_MonetaryProcessing (4.7). Remove ledger-processing logic from Phase3_Transaction to ensure side-effects are only handled by the Transaction Authority.
